title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Moment 137: Finance Isn’t Rocket Science! The 2 Simple Skills Billionaires Use Everyday: Codie Sanchez
guest: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Moment 137
